description: The TextureSizeDriver component drives a field with the size of a texture in pixels.

fields.Texture: The texture to get a size from.
fields.Target: The value field to drive with the final result value.
fields.DriveMode: The way of restricting ``Texture`` size values as second step.
fields.Premultiply: The value to multiply the ``Texture`` size by as first step.
fields.Ratio: The value to multiply the ``Texture`` size by as the third step.
fields.MaxSize: The value to restrict the output value to be less than this as the final step.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a ``Texture`` and a ``Target`` to get started.
